meta.title: An image analysis study of adenovirus type 5-induced crystalline inclusions -- Carstens and Marusyk 29 (3): 249 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: A combined electron microscopic and optical diffractometric study of Ad5-induced non-virion protein crystals found in the nuclei of infected KB cells at late times (48 to 72 h p.i.) after infection has been carried out. Data obtained have indicated that the unit cell of the crystal is rectangular and not hexagonal as previously presumed.
